author: Joseph Kim
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Translate selected text in Obsidian's native PDF reader with local and cloud translation services.

manifest.author: Kim Fischer
manifest.description: Translate selected text in the native PDF reader with local and cloud translation services.
manifest.name: LLM Translator

name: LLM Translator

releases.author: KimFischer99
releases.description:
✏️  New: Native PDF Highlight Annotations

  - Create persistent highlight annotations directly in PDF files, written as standard highlight annotations, visible in any PDF reader
  - 5 highlight colors: Yellow, Red, Blue, Green, Purple (configurable default)
  - Highlight notes: click any highlight to attach a note, stored in the PDF
  - Toggle highlights on/off, undo with Cmd+Z / Ctrl+Z
  - Smart persistence with debounced auto-save to avoid file conflicts

  Other Changes

  - Updated project screenshots to WebP format
  - Updated install instructions to v0.3.0
releases.name: v0.3.0

releases.author: KimFischer99
releases.description:
Changes:
- Add bidirectional language swap button to sidebar (same as popup)
- Replace localStorage with moment.locale() for language detection
- Add GitHub Actions workflow for artifact attestation
- Fix plugin review recommendations

releases.author: KimFischer99

Fix plugin review issues:
- Add MIT license file

- Fix README headings for review bot
- Replace deprecated builtin-modules package
- Remove unsupported CSS text-justify property
releases.name: v0.2.4

releases.author: KimFischer99
releases.description:
## v0.2.3

### ✨ New Features
- **i18n Support**: Auto-detect Obsidian language, support Chinese & English UI
- **Markdown Translation**: Enable Global mode in settings to translate Markdown files
- **Right Sidebar**: Sidebar now opens on the right side of Obsidian

### 🛠 Improvements
- Comprehensive Chinese/English README with setup guide
- Recommended settings table for quick configuration
- Default model: hy-mt2-1.8b-q4:latest
- Fix loadSettings null handling for first-time install
releases.name: v0.2.3
